title: Local dev and CI gate setup
goal: Create a deterministic verify pipeline that blocks merges when quality gates fail.
constraints: Do not bypass checks in CI.
Keep workflow runtime under 10 minutes for baseline checks.
definition_of_done: CI runs verify on pull requests.
PR template includes verify output and rollback note sections.
rollback_note: If CI gate blocks all development, temporarily revert workflow change and keep local verify command until workflow is fixed.
